This is a rare and durable complex function watch in the reissue market. The "Sun, Moon, and Stars" feature includes a date (position), month (position), and day of the week (position) that operate normally and can be manually adjusted (date adjusted clockwise in the second position, month adjusted through a hidden button, day of the week adjusted by moving the hands). The star disk rotates synchronously with the genuine product, completing one cycle per month. Dimensions: mm*mm.

Blancpain: BLS - New To Time series racing chronograph. Blancpain has released the new To Time series racing chronograph: To Time Racing / To Time Martini Racing. Known for its bold designs, Blancpain watches have often been too large for many smaller wrists to wear comfortably. The latest TO TIME racing chronograph is finally available in a smaller size. As one of the earliest creators of chronographs, Blancpain has always been closely associated with motorsports. This watch is inspired by vintage racing cars, featuring a cushion-shaped case with a round bezel and decorative guilloché patterns at the four corners. The dial incorporates a retro dashboard style, with unique rounded rectangular subdials and a round perforated strap, exuding an elegant classical charm. The dial colors include modern designs such as black-silver and green-silver, as well as a limited special edition in collaboration with the Martini Racing team, featuring the team's iconic blue, light blue, and red stripes for a vintage and stylish look. The watch is equipped with Blancpain's in-house movement, featuring a stable fish-scale patterned oscillating weight, with each movement tested for hours before leaving the factory. The watch comes with a new matching leather strap with contrasting stitching, designed for both comfort and style.

Breitling Super Ocean Culture II Limited Edition Chronograph. Celebrating the anniversary of the Super Ocean series, known as the pioneer of deep-sea exploration, Breitling injects new vitality while retaining its unique characteristics. The new bezel design features stainless steel with a highly durable scratch-resistant and shock-resistant ceramic bezel insert, integrating seamlessly with the same-color dial adorned with the brand's iconic logo. The addition of the panda chronograph dial enhances the charm of the new Breitling Super Ocean Culture II chronograph. The three contrasting subdials at 3, 6, and 9 o'clock correspond to minute timing, hour timing, and small seconds, exuding a classic mechanical beauty. The triangular hour hand, diamond-shaped minute hand, and tapered hour markers are coated with Suer-LumiNova® for night-time visibility. A date window at 4-5 o'clock adds practicality to the classic dial. Equipped with Breitling's in-house movement, the watch features a reliable fish-scale pattern engraved movement, tested for hours before leaving the factory. The series comes with a new matching leather-rubber strap with contrasting stitching for a stylish look and comfortable wear. The original Milanese steel bracelet is intricately crafted and can be disassembled with screws like the original.
